purpose: Define the final architecture goal for reliable publish opportunity capture and deterministic state synchronization.
design_intent: Harden the existing file-based architecture so runtime controls, scheduler decisions, and UI state converge on one authoritative server state with explicit provenance and failure semantics.
change_impact: Affects API contracts, scheduler behavior, frontend state orchestration, persistence flow, and operational runbooks; reduces missed publishes and restart drift risk.
problem_statement: Runtime controls and publish cadence logic are currently vulnerable to drift across memory, file persistence, and UI polling windows, causing missed publish opportunities and inconsistent operator state.

final_goal.name: Deterministic state authority and opportunity capture
final_goal.definition: All mutable runtime controls are persisted through one serialized atomic path, surfaced via versioned server-authoritative APIs, consumed by stale-safe frontend sync, and used by scheduler adaptation that is insulated from short-interval gap recheck noise.
final_goal.completion_gate: No control-plane divergence across restart/reload paths and no adaptive interval inflation caused by gap-policy recheck sampling.

success_criteria.name: Durable control persistence
success_criteria.metric: 0 silent persistence failures in control mutations; API returns explicit error on persistence failure

success_criteria.name: State version convergence
success_criteria.metric: Every control mutation response includes stateVersion and persistedAt; conflicting writes are rejected deterministically

success_criteria.name: Frontend stale-response immunity
success_criteria.metric: Out-of-order poll/mutation responses cannot overwrite newer control state

success_criteria.name: Opportunity-capture scheduler behavior
success_criteria.metric: Adaptive interval uses publish-opportunity signal windows unaffected by gap-policy recheck cadence

success_criteria.name: Operational explainability
success_criteria.metric: Operators can identify effective control values, source provenance, and decision reason from API + logs without code inspection

invariants: Publisher success stays fail-closed and requires verified redirect out of write screen.
Control mutations are write-through and return authoritative re-read state, not optimistic echoes.
No new in-memory-only mutable control fields are introduced.
Env/schema/contract updates remain synchronized when env variables change.
non_goals: Replace file persistence with a database in this initiative
Rewrite the entire frontend state layer or migrate to a new global state framework
Introduce websocket-only synchronization as a dependency for correctness
